name: super-professor
description: Plugin for creating modern, pedagogically rigorous lessons from academic repository materials
author: Demetrios
notes: Phase 1 local prototype. When packaging for distribution (Phase 5), move skill files from .claude/skills/ to skills/ and update these paths.

skills.name: super-professor
skills.description: Full lesson creation pipeline with interactive planning and checkpoints

skills.name: lesson-repo-setup
skills.description: Analyze or initialize academic repository structure

skills.name: lesson-corpus
skills.description: Audit repository materials against the lesson brief

skills.name: lesson-research
skills.description: Search and validate high-quality external sources

skills.name: lesson-plan
skills.description: Create time-bounded lesson plan with source traceability

skills.name: lesson-blueprint
skills.description: Generate detailed slide-by-slide blueprint for HTML rendering

skills.name: lesson-qa
skills.description: Validate any pipeline artefact against quality contracts
